# 3.4 Event Publishing

Typed convenience layer over `PipelineEvent[T]` and `PubSubPublisher[F]` from `pipeline-models`. One method per event type; emits with correct types/fields per BEHAVIORAL_SPECS §4.

#### `IngestionEventPublisher[F[_]]` — Trait

```
trait IngestionEventPublisher[F[_]] {
  def billTextAvailable(event: BillTextAvailableEvent): F[String]
  def billTextIngested(event: BillTextIngestedEvent): F[String]
  def voteRecorded(event: VoteRecordedEvent): F[String]
  def memberUpdated(event: MemberUpdatedEvent): F[String]
}
```

Each method: (1) wraps payload in `PipelineEvent.create(eventType, source, payload)`, (2) delegates to `PubSubPublisher[F].publish`, (3) returns Pub/Sub message ID. Event types: `"bill.text.available"`, `"bill.text.ingested"`, `"vote.recorded"`, `"member.updated"`. Source injected via config (e.g., `"bill-ingestion"`, `"vote-ingestion"`, `"member-profile-pipeline"`, `"lis-mapping-refresher"`).

| Acceptance Criterion | Test |
|---------------------|------|
| `billTextAvailable` publishes with eventType `"bill.text.available"` | Capture published event → verify eventType |
| `billTextIngested` publishes with eventType `"bill.text.ingested"` | Capture published event → verify eventType |
| `voteRecorded` publishes with eventType `"vote.recorded"` | Capture published event → verify eventType |
| `memberUpdated` publishes with eventType `"member.updated"` | Capture published event → verify eventType |
| Source from config, not hardcoded | Two instances with different source configs → verify different source in events |
| Event envelope includes generated UUID and timestamp | Published event → eventId non-null UUID, timestamp ≈ now |
| Publisher failure propagates as `PublishFailed` | Mock publisher throws → `PublishFailed` raised |
| Retry wraps publish calls | Mock 1 failure then success → succeeds on retry |

#### `EventTypeConstants` — Object

```
object EventTypeConstants {
  val BillTextAvailable = "bill.text.available"
  val BillTextIngested = "bill.text.ingested"
  val VoteRecorded = "vote.recorded"
  val AnalysisCompleted = "analysis.completed"
  val MemberUpdated = "member.updated"
  val UserProfileUpdated = "user.profile.updated"
  val ScoringUserRequested = "scoring.user.requested"
  val ScoringUserCompleted = "scoring.user.completed"
  val DailyIngestionStart = "daily.ingestion.start"
}
```

| Acceptance Criterion | Test |
|---------------------|------|
| All event type strings are dot-separated lowercase | Each constant matches `^[a-z]+(\.[a-z]+)+$` |
| Constants match event catalog in BEHAVIORAL_SPECS §4 | Cross-reference each constant against spec |
